entry.title: The Billion-Dollar Poison: How America's Sweetest Brand Fooled a Generation
entry.description:
For fifty years , you were told that fat makes you fat. That butter, red meat, and eggs were quietly killing you.
This is the dark business history behind The sugar lobby's bribery of scientists in the 1960s to blame fat for heart disease.
Chapters:
0:00 The Big Lie
0:50 A Nation in Fear
1:48 The Two Suspects
2:59 Project 226
3:52 The Payoff
4:55 Forging the Science
6:03 The Golden Stamp
7:14 The Hit Job
8:24 The Low-Fat Craze
9:37 The Unseen Epidemic
10:46 The Paper Trail
12:04 The Bitter Truth
Watch the full Dark Business Empires series on this channel.
Subscribe to Shadow Empires for more corporate scandals, hidden monopolies, and stories of power gone wrong.
